assertions.title: /coins/markets returns CoinGecko-shaped market rows

steps.action: GET /coins/markets?vs_currency=usd&per_page=5&page=1
steps.expected: 200 array with identity + market fields

assertions.title: /coins/markets defaults to deterministic market-cap-desc ordering

steps.action: Inspect first page ordering
steps.expected: Descending market cap / deterministic rank order

assertions.title: /coins/markets preserves explicit ids ordering, drops unknown ids, and bypasses page slicing

steps.action: GET explicit ids with unknown id and page/per_page limits
steps.expected: ethereum then bitcoin only, unaffected by page/per_page

assertions.title: /coins/markets toggles sparkline output explicitly

steps.action: Compare sparkline=true vs sparkline=false
steps.expected: sparkline_in_7d.price only when requested

assertions.title: /coins/markets exposes only requested price-change windows

steps.action: Compare price_change_percentage requested vs omitted
steps.expected: *_in_currency fields only when requested

assertions.title: /coins/markets rejects unsupported order values

steps.action: GET /coins/markets with unsupported order
steps.expected: 400 invalid_parameter Unsupported order value

assertions.title: /coins/markets enforces precision validation and serialization

steps.action: GET invalid precision then valid precision=2
steps.expected: 400 for invalid and rounded numeric serialization for valid

assertions.title: validation override routes stay hidden outside validation mode

steps.action: POST override routes on 3001
steps.expected: 404 not_found on both routes

assertions.title: invalid degraded override modes fail closed in validation mode

steps.action: POST invalid degraded_state mode on 3102
steps.expected: 400 invalid_parameter
steps.observed: status 400, body {"error":"invalid_parameter","message":"mode must be one of off, stale_disallowed, stale_allowed, degraded_seeded_bootstrap."}

keyJson.message: mode must be one of off, stale_disallowed, stale_allowed, degraded_seeded_bootstrap.
